docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPOERTY FROM LIEN (CAL. CIVIL CODE 8490) (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY QUESADA'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 4, 2015. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN MAY 15, 2015 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY QUESADA's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Stipulation to expunge mechanics lien on file. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Jun-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew McClelland, Esq. of Lunski & Stimpert LLP, (415-426-3525), for Anthony Quesada, Plaintiff and moving party.
No other appearances.

Plaintiff's counsel orally represented to the Court in open court that counsel personally went to the Post Office on May 6, 2015 and mailed the courtesy copies of the moving papers to the Court. Court grants plaintiff's request to continue the motion to another date, and not take the motion off calendar.

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY QUESADA'S Notice Of Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is CONTINUED to June 12, 2015 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. Plaintiff's counsel is instructed to give notice. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Continued To Jun-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY QUESADA's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is continued to June 4, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than May 15, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
